# MCP Time Server Tools Test
# Tests the get_current_time and convert_time tools

# Build the time server binary
go build -o mcp-time-server .

# Test get_current_time tool with UTC timezone
exec mcp-time-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_time","arguments":{"timezone":"UTC"}},"id":2}
EOF

# Verify get_current_time response structure
stdout '"timezone":"UTC"'
stdout '"datetime"'
stdout '"is_dst"'

# Test get_current_time with New York timezone
exec mcp-time-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_time","arguments":{"timezone":"America/New_York"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"timezone":"America/New_York"'
stdout '"datetime"'
stdout '"is_dst"'

# Test get_current_time with London timezone
exec mcp-time-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_time","arguments":{"timezone":"Europe/London"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"timezone":"Europe/London"'
stdout '"datetime"'
stdout '"is_dst"'

# Test convert_time tool from UTC to New York
exec mcp-time-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"convert_time","arguments":{"source_timezone":"UTC","time":"14:30","target_timezone":"America/New_York"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"source"'
stdout '"target"'
stdout '"time_difference"'
stdout '"timezone":"UTC"'
stdout '"timezone":"America/New_York"'

# Test convert_time from New York to Tokyo
exec mcp-time-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"convert_time","arguments":{"source_timezone":"America/New_York","time":"09:00","target_timezone":"Asia/Tokyo"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"source"'
stdout '"target"'
stdout '"time_difference"'
stdout '"timezone":"America/New_York"'
stdout '"timezone":"Asia/Tokyo"'
